specs.title: Backlog Fixes and Test Progress Reporting

drifted.spec_text: All 7 body registry TryAdd/TryRemove in SimulationCommands return Result.Error with descriptive message
drifted.actual: 6/7 fixed. clearAll function silently counts TryRemove failures into registryWarnings counter instead of returning Result.Error

observations.detail: disposeExpirationTimer() exported but never called during shutdown
FR-005 mentions configurable timeout but 30s is hardcoded. Matches spec assumption default.
